About Me

Singer. Storyteller.
Strategist.

I'm Khushi Bajpai — a B.Pharma student, National Idol finalist, and Social Media Marketing professional who found her true calling at the intersection of creativity and digital strategy.

My journey from classical music stages to managing high-profile brand accounts has given me a unique edge: I don't just create content — I craft experiences that resonate emotionally and convert commercially.

Currently interning as SMM Lead at Bannstudio Agency, I manage end-to-end digital presence for clients spanning hospitality, lifestyle, FMCG, and education.

🎵Indian Idol National Finalist — Top 32 Nationwide
🎬Film credits: Luka Chuppi (Bollywood) background performer
🎓6-year Classical Music Certification with Distinction
📍Based in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh

My professional journey

Over the past year, I've gone from intern to lead strategist — managing full client lifecycles, coordinating shoots, writing scripts, editing videos, and measuring impact across multiple high-profile brands simultaneously.

Brands I've helped thrive

From luxury hospitality to grassroots education — I've built and scaled social media presence for a diverse portfolio of clients, each with their own story, audience, and goals.

Marketing Agency

Managed the agency's own social presence — creating viral office reels, brand storytelling content, and building the agency's credibility through high-engagement posts. Drove 74,892 views and 1,992 interactions in a single month.

Office Culture Reels

Conceptualised, scripted, acted in, and produced viral office-humour reels for Bannstudio Agency that generated massive organic reach. Reels with 6K–7.8K views each, becoming the agency's top-performing content format.
